summary: Tested Phase 9: Partner Power Tools - All 4 new partner-analytics endpoints PASSED (15/15 tests). Frontend Lead Pipeline Kanban and My Performance dashboard fully functional. Existing Partner/Admin/Client dashboards still working.

GET /api/partner-analytics/performance.details: Returns sales stats (total, approved, pending, rejected, approval_rate), revenue (total_fee, total_received, total_commission, avg_deal_size, collection_rate), leads (total, approved, rejected, conversion_rate), monthly_trend (6 months), top_products, top_countries

GET /api/partner-analytics/targets.details: Returns current_month, targets (monthly_sales_target=10, monthly_revenue_target=500000, monthly_leads_target=15, monthly_commission_target=50000), progress, completion percentages

GET /api/partner-analytics/leaderboard.details: Returns ranked list of partners sorted by total_revenue descending. Each entry has rank, partner_id, partner_name, total_sales, total_revenue, total_commission, total_leads, is_you flag

GET /api/partner-analytics/pipeline-summ.details: Returns pre-assessments grouped by stage with count and items (id, pa_number, client_name, country, service_type, created_at)

frontend_lead_pipeline.details: Lead Pipeline tab in Partner sidebar. Kanban board with 6 columns: New Leads, Payment Pending, Paid, Under Review, Approved, Proposal Sent. Each card shows client name, country, service type, PA number, date

frontend_my_performance.details: My Performance tab in Partner sidebar. Shows Monthly Targets with progress bars (Sales, Revenue, Leads, Commission), Key Metrics cards (Total Revenue, Approval Rate, Avg Deal Size, Lead Conversion), Revenue Trend chart (6 months), Top Products, Top Countries, Partner Leaderboard with 'You' badge

existing_partner_dashboard.details: Partner Dashboard, My Sales, Commission tabs all working. New Sale button functional

existing_admin_dashboard.details: Admin Dashboard with Quick Actions, Client Happiness Score, stats, Document Expiry Tracker, Recent Pending Sales all working

existing_client_dashboard.details: Client Dashboard with welcome wizard, Documents, Support tabs working

existing_pre_assessment_workflow.details: Pre-Assessment Pipeline with stats cards, New Pre-Assessment button, list with stage badges all working

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 Partner Power Tools fully functional. 4 new endpoints: /api/partner-analytics/performance, /targets, /leaderboard, /pipeline-summary. Frontend has Lead Pipeline (Kanban) and My Performance tabs in Partner sidebar. Default monthly targets: 10 sales, ₹500K revenue, 15 leads, ₹50K commission. Leaderboard sorted by total_revenue descending with is_you flag for current partner.
